default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To conduct a deep dive with SentinelOne's Joshua Hernandez on brand guidelines and content review processes, which was rescheduled due to timing conflicts.](https://fathom.video/share/1pKSNa8zYS-S8nXUyKs8bZqzsX2SYNuz?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SentinelOne is undergoing a brand refresh, including voice, design, and motion, with guidelines expected in 2-3 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/1pKSNa8zYS-S8nXUyKs8bZqzsX2SYNuz?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Content review will involve Joshua, Drew, and Tim Wolford (PMM lead) for technical accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/1pKSNa8zYS-S8nXUyKs8bZqzsX2SYNuz?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
  - [GrowthX team to create artifacts based on SentinelOne's evolving brand guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/1pKSNa8zYS-S8nXUyKs8bZqzsX2SYNuz?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
  - [Scheduling challenges exist due to ongoing rebranding efforts and busy schedules](https://fathom.video/share/1pKSNa8zYS-S8nXUyKs8bZqzsX2SYNuz?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)

## Topics

### SentinelOne Rebranding Status

  - [Joshua has been with SentinelOne for 2.5 months, leading a comprehensive brand refresh](https://fathom.video/share/1pKSNa8zYS-S8nXUyKs8bZqzsX2SYNuz?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)
  - [Includes brand voice, design, and motion updates](https://fathom.video/share/1pKSNa8zYS-S8nXUyKs8bZqzsX2SYNuz?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
  - [Website refresh also in progress](https://fathom.video/share/1pKSNa8zYS-S8nXUyKs8bZqzsX2SYNuz?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
  - [Brand positioning to be finalized next week](https://fathom.video/share/1pKSNa8zYS-S8nXUyKs8bZqzsX2SYNuz?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)
  - [Voice guidelines expected in 2-3 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/1pKSNa8zYS-S8nXUyKs8bZqzsX2SYNuz?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
  - [Current focus on aligning overall brand messaging before detailing product/service communication](https://fathom.video/share/1pKSNa8zYS-S8nXUyKs8bZqzsX2SYNuz?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)

### Content Review Process

  - [Joshua suggests a trio for content review:](https://fathom.video/share/1pKSNa8zYS-S8nXUyKs8bZqzsX2SYNuz?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
    1.  Joshua Hernandez (brand tone/conversation)
    2.  Drew (role not specified)
    3.  Tim Wolford (PMM lead, for technical accuracy)
  - [PMM team crucial for ensuring correct technical language and product details](https://fathom.video/share/1pKSNa8zYS-S8nXUyKs8bZqzsX2SYNuz?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)

### GrowthX Team Updates

  - [Received access to list of vulnerabilities for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/1pKSNa8zYS-S8nXUyKs8bZqzsX2SYNuz?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [SEO team lead call provided clear priorities (notes available)](https://fathom.video/share/1pKSNa8zYS-S8nXUyKs8bZqzsX2SYNuz?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [Future opportunity: content translation into multiple languages](https://fathom.video/share/1pKSNa8zYS-S8nXUyKs8bZqzsX2SYNuz?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Other Client Updates

  - [Diligent: Artifacts sent for review, weekly sync tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/1pKSNa8zYS-S8nXUyKs8bZqzsX2SYNuz?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
  - [Okta: Recent call clarified direction, focusing on foundational artifacts and industry-specific deep dives](https://fathom.video/share/1pKSNa8zYS-S8nXUyKs8bZqzsX2SYNuz?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Reschedule SentinelOne deep dive for later this week](https://fathom.video/share/1pKSNa8zYS-S8nXUyKs8bZqzsX2SYNuz?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)
  - [GrowthX to internally decide on a suitable time slot from Joshua's availability](https://fathom.video/share/1pKSNa8zYS-S8nXUyKs8bZqzsX2SYNuz?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
  - [Joshua to message Tim Wolford about scheduling a product marketing deep dive](https://fathom.video/share/1pKSNa8zYS-S8nXUyKs8bZqzsX2SYNuz?tab=summary&timestamp=839.0)
  - [GrowthX to create internal artifacts based on SentinelOne's evolving brand guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/1pKSNa8zYS-S8nXUyKs8bZqzsX2SYNuz?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
  - [Aida to review new batch of Augment Codes articles](https://fathom.video/share/1pKSNa8zYS-S8nXUyKs8bZqzsX2SYNuz?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
  - [Sydney to sync with Matt regarding Okta project scope](https://fathom.video/share/1pKSNa8zYS-S8nXUyKs8bZqzsX2SYNuz?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)

action_items.description: Review new batch of Augment Codes articles, focusing on editorial aspects
Slack Tim re. scheduling product deep dive w/ GrowthX team or assigning team member if Tim unavailable
Schedule new meeting time w/ Joshua for SentinelOne deep dive. Options: Thu 9-12/2:30-3:30 CT, Fri 9-11/3-5 CT
